## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what are you adding/changing? -->

## Resource metadata (for additions)

- **Title:**
- **URL:**
- **Author / org:**
- **Resource-type row:** <!-- e.g. Articles & Essays -->
- **Topic cell (T1–T21):** <!-- e.g. T8 RAG -->
- **Provenance (who cites it?):**

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] This is a **resource** (article/book/course/paper/talk/cookbook/benchmark/etc.), **not a pure tool**.
- [ ] I placed the entry in the **strongest-fit** matrix cell (no cross-posting except Trending/Milestones/Core).
- [ ] The link resolves and uses the canonical URL (no tracking params, no shorteners).
- [ ] The one-line description explains *what you'll learn / why it matters*, not marketing copy.
- [ ] The entry isn't already listed elsewhere in the README.
- [ ] Formatting matches neighbouring entries (order, icons, shields).
- [ ] `awesome-lint` and `markdownlint` pass locally (or CI will verify).
